sections.paragraph:
plur. עֳמָרִים-

(1) i.q. עָמִיר a sheaf, Levit. 23:10 , seq.; Job 24:10. (Arabic غَمُورُ a bundle).

(2) a measure of dry things, containing the tenth part of an Ephah, Exo 16:22, 32 Exo 16:32especially 36 Exo 16:36, not to be confounded with the measure חֹמֶר, which contained ten Ephahs.
